All six known Delta<0 degree-two PCF families (Delta in {-3,-4,-7,-11,-20,-28}) confirm the Stokes-exponent diagnostic S<1 under at least one CM-respecting deformation, completing the empirical predicate STOKES PREDICATE COMPLETE.
script: stokes_session_b.py via ql02_stokes.py, ql06_stokes.py, ql15_stokes.py, ql26_stokes.py

claim: Theorem 3.1 (F(2,4) Trans-stratum closed form, Delta in {+1,+8}): every Trans family admits an elementary closed form in Q(pi,e,log Q^x,zeta(3),sqrt(Q),gamma); 24 explicit rows in the table.

Intra-field replication: QL06 (Delta=-7, h=1, Heegner) and QL26 (Delta=-28, h=2, non-Heegner) both lie in Q(sqrt(-7)) and both confirm S<1; the non-Heegner partner shows the stronger signal (S_min=-0.324 vs S_min=0.364), ruling out the Heegner-number hypothesis directly.
